description: A logistics manager needs to ship 1 ton of goods over 2000 km with a strict carbon cap of 160 kg CO2 eq. Determine the minimum rail share (0.0 to 1.0) required to meet this target using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Model this in a process named 'freight_route_optimized' using a 'rail_share' parameter to distribute 2000 t*km between Truck (diesel combination truck) and Train (diesel train). Record the minimum rail share (to 2 decimal places) and the resulting Global Warming Air impact (TRACI 2.1) in ~/LCA_Results/optimization_report.txt.
